'''Halm''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] member of [[Talon Karrde]]'s organization and was assigned to go to [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]] with Karrde, [[Shada D'ukal]], and [[Ferson]] to protect the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] students. He was shot and killed by a member of the [[Peace Brigade]] as they [[Invasion of Yavin 4|blockaded]] the [[Yavin system/Legends|Yavin system]].<ref name="NJO" />
